name: CPU pod for data preprocessing
description: User wants a CPU-only pod for data preprocessing, no GPU needed.
user_intent: I need a CPU-only pod for data preprocessing, no GPU required. Find available CPU flavors first, then create a pod with ubuntu:22.04 using a valid CPU instanceId (format: <flavor>-<vcpus>-<memGB>, e.g. cpu3c-2-4). Name it rpcli-eval-cpu. After creating, verify the pod exists.
expected_outcome: Agent lists CPU flavors via 'resource cpu', picks a valid flavor, constructs an instanceId (e.g. cpu3c-2-4), and creates a CPU pod. The pod is verified to exist.
